original_snippet_context: Discussion of Argentina's experience with foreign capital and monetary policy, potentially as a model for Brazil.
relevant_quote: Esperava-se a instabilidade da moeda. Todavia, para evitar quanto fosse possivel, o projecto creava um nivel a circulação fiduciaria, pela entrega que faria a quem a solicitasse, de um peso de curso legal por 44 centavos de ouro que receba em ouro.
justification: This text describes Argentina's approach to managing its currency and mentions a project aimed at stabilizing fiduciary circulation by backing it with gold. It doesn't express a clear opinion on Brazil's "Caixa de Conversão" itself but provides context by referencing a similar policy in another country.
